description_long: This kiosk features a three-panel display structure mounted on a rectangular base, with each panel angled slightly outward to create a semi-enclosed presentation area. The central panel is the tallest and displays a large promotional image and text for a men's grooming brand, flanked by two shorter side panels with additional images and product displays. The panels are constructed from smooth, white material and are supported by discrete feet for stability. The base is a dark, glossy platform with a blue mat, and a raised block at the front displays a website URL. The kiosk is designed for visual merchandising and product promotion, with no visible windows or doors, and is intended for placement in high-traffic urban environments such as malls or sidewalks. The overall design is sleek and modern, emphasizing clean lines and bold graphics.
description: A modern, three-panel promotional kiosk with bold graphics, a glossy base, and a central display for men's grooming products.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three display panels with promotional graphics, central branding, and a raised block with a website URL.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the panels and the depth of the base, with minimal visible graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of the three panels and the overall structure of the kiosk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side panel's thickness and the kiosk's layered base.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs integrated into the front and side panels, featuring promotional images, product graphics, and a website URL on a raised block at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, open-topped with no overhangs or decorative elements; panels extend vertically from the base.
